SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbortMessage
Message sent by the coordinator to participants during Phase 2 to abort a transaction.
AppConfig
Application-level bean configuration for WebClient and Jackson.
BaseSimulationConfigController
Abstract base controller for the simulation-mode configuration endpoint.
CommitMessage
Message sent by the coordinator to participants during Phase 2 to commit a transaction.
CoordinatorApplication
Entry point for the 2PC Coordinator service.
CoordinatorConfig
Spring configuration that wires CoordinatorFaultStrategy implementations into a Map<FaultType, CoordinatorFaultStrategy> bean consumed by the fault-injection service, and registers the crash interceptor.
CoordinatorFaultController
REST controller for injecting and clearing faults on the coordinator node.
CoordinatorFaultService
Manages fault injection state for the coordinator node.
CoordinatorFaultStrategy
Strategy contract for applying or clearing a specific type of fault on the coordinator.
CoordinatorHeartbeatMonitor
Actively monitors coordinator liveness by polling its GET /api/coordinator/status endpoint at a configurable interval.
CoordinatorNodeStatus
Immutable snapshot of the coordinator's health status at a given point in time.
CoordinatorStatusController
REST controller that reports the current status of the coordinator node.
CoordinatorStatusService
Computes the current health status of the coordinator node.
CoordinatorTransaction
Mutable coordinator-side view of a 2PC transaction.
CrashCoordinatorFaultStrategy
CoordinatorFaultStrategy that simulates a coordinator crash by setting an atomic flag.
CrashCoordinatorInterceptor
Spring MVC interceptor that returns HTTP 503 on every request when the coordinator crash simulation is active.
CrashFaultStrategy
CRASH fault strategy: when active, the node returns HTTP 503 to all incoming requests.
CrashInterceptor
Servlet interceptor that returns HTTP 503 for every request when the CRASH fault is active.
DelayedDecisionFaultStrategy
CoordinatorFaultStrategy that inserts an artificial delay before the coordinator broadcasts its Phase 2 decision, simulating a slow or stalled coordinator.
ElectionController
REST endpoints used during coordinator-failure election.
ElectionService
Implements the participant-side termination protocol that runs when the coordinator does not respond.
EventPublisher
Publishes SystemEventDto events to all connected WebSocket subscribers.
EventType
Significant events that flow through the system and are broadcast via WebSocket to the UI.
FaultController
REST controller for injecting and clearing faults on this participant node.
FaultDefault
Default parameter values for all fault-injection strategies.
FaultInjectionService
Manages fault injection state for a single participant node.
FaultRequest
Request body for injecting a fault into a node.
FaultType
Types of faults that can be injected into any node (coordinator or participant).
ForceAbortVoteFaultStrategy
FORCE_ABORT_VOTE fault strategy: forces the participant to vote NO on the next N prepare requests.
GlobalExceptionHandler
Registers the shared HTTP exception handler as a controller advice in the coordinator context.
GlobalExceptionHandler
Registers the shared HTTP exception handler as a controller advice in the participant context.
HttpExceptionHandlerSupport
Shared HTTP exception-handling logic for all service modules.
InMemoryParticipantRepository
Thread-safe in-memory implementation of ParticipantRepository.
InMemoryTransactionLog
Thread-safe in-memory transaction log for a participant.
InMemoryTransactionRepository
Thread-safe in-memory implementation of TransactionRepository.
IntermittentFaultStrategy
Fault strategy that simulates intermittent failures: once activated the node randomly rejects requests with a configurable probability.
LogEntry
Immutable log entry written by a participant before responding to any 2PC message.
MetricsController
REST endpoint that exposes aggregate transaction metrics to the UI.
MetricsResponse
Response DTO used by the coordinator's metrics endpoint to expose transaction outcome statistics and the current simulation configuration to the UI.
MetricsService
Computes aggregate statistics across all transactions to give the UI a live fault-coverage and outcome summary.
NetworkDelayFaultStrategy
NETWORK_DELAY fault strategy: adds configurable latency to every outbound response.
NodeRole
Logical roles that identify nodes participating in the 2PC protocol.
NodeStatus
Online/offline status of a node as reported to the coordinator or UI.
OpenApiConfig
SpringDoc OpenAPI configuration for the 2PC Coordinator service.
OpenApiConfig
SpringDoc OpenAPI configuration for the 2PC Participant service.
PartialSendFaultStrategy
CoordinatorFaultStrategy that simulates partial Phase 2 delivery: the coordinator sends commit/abort to only the first count participants (default 1), leaving the rest uncertain.
ParticipantApplication
Entry point for a 2PC Participant service instance.
ParticipantConfig
Spring configuration for the participant service.
ParticipantController
REST controller for participant registration and listing.
ParticipantFaultStrategy
Strategy contract for applying or clearing a specific fault type on a participant node.
ParticipantHttpClient
HTTP client for sending 2PC protocol messages to a single participant.
ParticipantRegistrationDto
Registration payload sent by a participant to the coordinator at startup.
ParticipantRegistrationService
Handles participant registration and status management in the coordinator.
ParticipantRepository
Port (interface) for reading and updating registered participant data.
PeerConsultationClient
HTTP client used to query a peer participant's persisted log entry for a given transaction during coordinator-failure election.
PeerLogEntryDto
Participant's local log entry for a transaction.
PrepareMessage
Message sent by the coordinator to each participant during Phase 1 of the 2PC protocol.
ProtocolController
REST controllers that receive 2PC protocol messages from the coordinator.
ProtocolService
Handles the 2PC protocol messages for this participant.
ProtocolTimeout
Timeout values used when the coordinator communicates with participants over HTTP during the Two-Phase Commit protocol.
RegisteredParticipant
Runtime representation of a participant node registered with the coordinator.
ResponseBodyKey
Keys and standard label values used in JSON error-response bodies returned by HTTP exception handlers.
SimulationConfigController
REST endpoint for reading and updating the simulation mode on the coordinator.
SimulationConfigController
REST endpoint for reading and updating the simulation mode on this participant node.
SimulationConfigRequest
Request payload for enabling or disabling the redundancy / recovery protocol on any node (coordinator or participant).
SimulationModePort
Port for reading and updating the simulation redundancy flag on any node.
SimulationModeService
Holds the coordinator-side flag that enables or disables the participant election-recovery protocol.
SimulationModeService
Holds the participant-side flag that enables or disables the election-recovery termination protocol.
StartupRegistrationRunner
Registers this participant with the coordinator on application startup.
StatusController
REST endpoint that exposes the current health and active-fault summary of this participant node.
SystemEventDto
Generic event broadcast over WebSocket to the UI via /topic/events.
TransactionController
REST controller that exposes transaction management to the UI and external clients.
TransactionRepository
Port for reading and writing coordinator-side transaction state.
TransactionRequest
Request body for initiating a new 2PC transaction via the coordinator REST API.
TransactionResponse
Response returned by the coordinator after a transaction has been initiated or completed.
TransactionResponseMapper
Maps CoordinatorTransaction domain objects to TransactionResponse DTOs.
TransactionStatus
Lifecycle states of a 2PC transaction, as seen by the coordinator.
TransientFaultStrategy
Fault strategy that simulates a transient failure: the node appears crashed for a configurable duration and then automatically recovers.
TwoPhaseCommitService
Orchestrates the Two-Phase Commit protocol from the coordinator's perspective.
UncertainTransactionRecoveryScheduler
Scheduled component that automatically recovers participants stuck in the TransactionStatus.PREPARING phase after the coordinator has failed.
VoteMessage
Participant response to a PREPARE message (Phase 1 of 2PC).
VoteResult
Possible outcomes of a participant vote in Phase 1 of the 2PC protocol.
WebMvcConfig
Registers Spring MVC interceptors for the participant service.
WebSocketConfig
Configures STOMP over WebSocket.
WebSocketTopic
STOMP WebSocket topic paths to which the coordinator publishes events.
